text.title: Diary Studies Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: recruit
step.action: Recruit; collect signed consent + retention terms.
step.decision-gate: Do not start without signed consent.

step.name: configure-prompts
step.action: Author daily prompt + event-triggered prompt; verify <=2 min entry time.

step.name: monitor-participation
step.action: Track completion_rate daily; escalate participants below 70%.

step.name: analyse-and-report
step.action: Group by participant + theme; mark longitudinal change; render report.
